you touched the right wall out of the two at the fruit
also i had to check if im dumb or not, and you do in fact not have to do the ledge
its not too late to increase that pushup timer
but there u have to rejump EARLY
to do a cherry align you need the wall left of the gap
tho this is likely nerfed if u look at the right apple
so the align of the left fruit of the two cherries
wrong align basically makes apple gaps impossible.
one align makes it so you cant even go thru. another lets you go thru for one of the animation frames. the final align lets you sit there forever
idk which align is half working cause why bother remembering that
he is the king. he doesnt need such things

u can setup the non ledge btw too :)
